patterns.pattern: [Person] は [place] に 行きます
[Person] は [adjective] [noun] が 好きです

patterns.examplesJson: [{"japanese":"私は学生です。","english":"I am a student."}]
[{"japanese":"猫が好きです。","english":"I like cats."}]
[{"japanese":"本を読みます。","english":"I read a book."}]
[{"japanese":"学校に行きます。","english":"I go to school."}]
[{"japanese":"家で勉強します。","english":"I study at home."}]
[{"japanese":"友達と話します。","english":"I talk with a friend."}]
[{"japanese":"本があります。","english":"There is a book."}]
[{"japanese":"猫がいます。","english":"There is a cat."}]
[{"japanese":"日本の音楽","english":"Japanese music"}]
[{"japanese":"九時から五時まで","english":"From 9 to 5"}]

patterns.pattern: A より B のほうが
patterns.examplesJson: [{"japanese":"コーヒーよりお茶のほうが好きです","english":"I prefer tea over coffee"}]
[{"japanese":"日本に行きたいです","english":"I want to go to Japan"}]
[{"japanese":"座ってください","english":"Please sit down"}]
[{"japanese":"入ってもいいです","english":"You may enter"}]
[{"japanese":"食べてはいけません","english":"You must not eat"}]
[{"japanese":"勉強するつもりです","english":"I intend to study"}]
[{"japanese":"日本語が話せます","english":"I can speak Japanese"}]
[{"japanese":"難しいと思います","english":"I think it is difficult"}]
[{"japanese":"雨なので行きません","english":"I will not go because of rain"}]
[{"japanese":"忙しいけど行きます","english":"I am busy but I will go"}]
[{"japanese":"雨が降るかもしれません","english":"It might rain"}]
[{"japanese":"食べすぎました","english":"I ate too much"}]
[{"japanese":"練習すれば上手になります","english":"If you practice you improve"}]
